TCL 06, 21 [distances of fixed stars][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
oo  (traces of 1 line)
o 2'2'

bi-rit MUL-MEŠ <ša₂> ziq-pi ša₂ i-na KASKAL šu₂-ut dEN.LIL₂ i-na MURU₂ [...]

(o 2') The distances between the culminating stars that stand in the path of Ellil, in the middle of [...] in front of the sky-watcher's chest, and by means of which [...] the risings and [...] of the stars at night.

o 3'3'

IGIet GABA ša₂ URU₃ir ANe GUB-MEŠzu-ma GE₆ MU₂ḫi u₃ [...]

o 4'4'

ša MUL-MEŠ i-na lib₃-bi-šu₂-nu [...]

o 5'5'

1.1/2 MA.NA KI.LA₂

9 UŠ i-na qaq-qa-ri

16 lim 2 me DANNA [...]

(o 5') 1 1/2 minas weight (of water in a waterclock) 9 UŠ on the ground 16 thousand, 2 hundred double-hours [...]

o 6'6'

TA mulŠUDUN

EN mulŠUDUN.[ANŠE ...]

(o 6') from the Yoke to the [...] Harness.

o 7'7'

2 MA.NA KI.LA₂

12 UŠ i-na qaq-qa-ri

21 lim 6 me ⸢DANNA⸣ [...]

(o 7') 2 minas weight 12 UŠ on the ground 21 thousand 6 hundred double-hours [...]

o 8'8'

TA mulŠUDUN.ANŠE EGIRti

EN ⸢mul⸣[GUR₂ti]

(o 8') from the rear Harness to the Circle.

o 9'9'

2.1/2 MA.NA MIN<(KI.LA₂)>

1/2 DANNA i-na KI.MIN<(qaq-qa-ri)>

27 lim DANNA ina [...]

(o 9') 2 1/2 minas ditto (weight) 1/2 league on ditto (the ground) 27 thousand double-hours in [...]

o 10'10'

TA mulGUR₂ti

EN MUL ša₂ maš-a-ti

(o 10') from the Circle to the star of the Twins.

o 11'11'

⸢2/3⸣ MA.NA MIN<(KI.LA₂)>

5 UŠ i-na KI.MIN<(qaq-qa-ri)>

9 DANNA ina KI.MIN<(ANe)>

(o 11') 2/3 mina ditto (weight) 5 UŠ on ditto (the ground) 9 thousand double-hours in ditto (heaven)

o 12'12'

TA MUL ša₂ maš-a-ti

EN MUL ša₂ taš-ka-a-ti1

(o 12') from the star of the Twins to the star of the Triplets.

o 13'13'

1.5/6 MA.NA MIN<(KI.LA₂)>

10 UŠ i-na KI.MIN<(qaq-qa-ri)>

18 lim DANNA ina KI.MIN<(ANe)>

(o 13') 1 5/6 minas ditto (weight) 10 UŠ on ditto (the ground) 18 thousand double-hours in ditto (heaven)

o 14'14'

TA MUL ša₂ taš-ka-a-ti

EN MUL DILI

(o 14') from the star of the Triplets to the Single Star.

o 15'15'

1.2/3 MA.NA MIN<(KI.LA₂)>

10 UŠ i-na KI.MIN<(qaq-qa-ri)>

18 lim DANNA ina KI.MIN<(ANe)>

(o 15') 1 2/3 minas ditto (weight) 10 UŠ on ditto (the ground) 18 thousand double-hours in ditto (heaven)

o 16'16'

TA MUL DILI

EN mulGAŠAN—TIN

(o 16') from the Single Star to Belet-balaṭi.

o 17'17'

3.1/3 MA.NA MIN<(KI.LA₂)>

2/3 DANNA i-na KI.MIN<(qaq-qa-ri)>

36 lim DANNA ina KI.MIN<(ANe)>

(o 17') 3 1/3 minas ditto (weight) 2/3 double-hour on ditto (the ground) 36 thousand double-hours in ditto (heaven)

o 18'18'

TA mulGAŠAN—TIN

EN qu₂-ma-ri ša₂ mulU₄.⸢KA⸣.DU₈.A

(o 18') from Belet-balaṭi to the Leopard's shoulder.

o 19'19'

1.2/3 MA.NA MIN<(KI.LA₂)>

10 UŠ i-na KI.MIN<(qaq-qa-ri)>

18 lim DANNA ina KI.MIN<(ANe)>

(o 19') 1 2/3 minas ditto (weight) 10 UŠ on ditto (the ground) 18 thousand double-hours in ditto (heaven)

o 20'20'

TA qu₂-ma-ri ša₂ mulU₄.KA.DU₈.A

EN MUL ne₂-bi-i ša GABA-šu₂

(o 20') from the Leopard's shoulder to the shining star of its (the Leopard's) chest.

o 21'21'

3.1/3 MA.NA MIN<(KI.LA₂)>

2/3 DANNA i-na KI.MIN<(qaq-qa-ri)>

36 lim DANNA ina KI.MIN<(ANe)>

o 22'22'

TA MUL ne₂-bi-i ša GABA-šu₂

EN mulkin-⸢ṣi⸣

TA mulkin-ṣi

EN mula-si-di

(o 24') from the Shin to the Heel.

TA mulna-aṣ-ra-pi

EN mulGAM₃

EN mulKIŠIB—GAM₃

mulMAŠ.TAB.BA

EN mulAL.LUL

10 UŠ i-na KI.MIN<(qaq-qa-ri)>

18 lim DANNA ina KI.MIN<(ANe)>

r 1414

TA 2 MUL-MEŠ ša₂ SAG.DU mulUR.GU.LA

EN MUL 4 ša₂ GABA-šu₂

r 1515

2/3 DANNA i-na KI.MIN<(qaq-qa-ri)>

2 lim DANNA ina KI.MIN<(ANe)>

r 1616

TA MUL 4 ša₂ GABA-šu₂

EN MUL 2 ša₂ GIŠ.KUN-šu₂

(r 16) from the 4 stars of its chest to the 2 stars of its loin.

r 1717

1.2/3 MA.NA MIN<(KI.LA₂)>

10 UŠ i-na KI.MIN<(qaq-qa-ri)>

18 lim DANNA ina KI.MIN<(ANe)>

r 1818

TA MUL 2 ša₂ GIŠ.KUN-šu₂

EN MUL DILI ša₂ KUN-šu₂

(r 18) from the 2 stars of its loin to the single star of its tail.

r 1919

10 UŠ i-na KI.MIN<(qaq-qa-ri)>

18 lim DANNA ina KI.MIN<(ANe)>

r 2020

TA MUL DILI ša₂ KUN-šu₂

EN mula-ru₆

(r 20) from the single star of its tail to the Frond.

r 2121

4 MA.NA 10 GIN₂ MIN<(KI.LA₂)>

2/3 DANNA i-na KI.MIN<(qaq-qa-ri)>

45 lim DANNA ina KI.MIN<(ANe)>

(r 21) 4 minas, 10 shekels ditto (weight) 2/3 double-hour on ditto (the ground) 45 thousand double-hours in ditto (heaven)

r 2222

TA mula-ru₆

EN mulŠUDUN.ANŠE

(r 22) from the Frond to the Harness.

r 2323

1 MA.NA 1/3 MA MIN<(KI.LA₂)>

8 UŠ i-na KI.MIN<(qaq-qa-ri)>

14 lim 4 me DANNA ina KI.MIN<(ANe)>

(r 23) 1 1/3 minas ditto (weight) 8 UŠ on ditto (the ground) 14 thousand, 4 hundred double-hours in ditto (heaven)

r 2424

TA mulŠUDUN.ANŠE

EN mulŠUDUN

(r 24) from the Harness to the Yoke.

r 2525

PAP 1(AŠ) GUN  ; 2/3 MA.NA  ; KI.LA₂

[...] DANNA 4 UŠ  ; ⸢mi-šiḫ⸣-ti  ; ana DANNA-MEŠ  ; ⸢ša₂ qaq-qa⸣-ri

ŠU.NIGIN 6 me 54 lim 2 me DANNA  ; mi-šiḫ-ti ana ⸢DANNA⸣-[MEŠ]; ša ANe TA mul[...]  ; mulŠUDUN [...]  ; MUL SAG [...]  ; a-di [...]

(r 25) Total: 1 talent, 2/3 mina weight. [...] double-hours, 4 UŠ distance for the double-hours of the ground. Total: 6 hundred 54 thousand, 2 hundred double-hours distance for the double-hours of heaven, from the [...] star [...] the Yoke [...] first star [...] to [...].

(rest of reverse missing)

1Takšatu is the correct name; here it has been metathesised.
